lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not really. Just wondering what brings you out here?

lines.speaker: Avinia
lines.text: I'm here to trade with the dwarves here on behalf of Fortis. Stonecutter Outpost is the main supplier of the stone we use for building.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And is the trading going well?

lines.speaker: Avinia
lines.text: Well it's significantly better than dealing with the dwarves in Cam Torum, but they're still not the easiest to work with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, well in that case, I'd better leave you to it.
